sourceAmbiguity: Refresh, replay, and browser back actions after callback lacked a deterministic patient-facing posture.
decisionTaken: Published refresh/back-button cases and Playwright checks for callback holding, consumed replay, stale return, consent decline, expired transaction, and signed-out back-button handling.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The browser action is not the authority. Route state is derived from session, return-intent, capability, and route-binding facts.
operationalRisk: Back-button handling must keep write actions fenced if route bindings are stale.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add cases for any new callback replay or settlement posture.
